automatic_overdue.author: Reviewing Attorney
automatic_overdue.basis: arraignment on the Class D charge was May 4, 2026; the Rule 16(b)(2) 7-day deadline for the Rule 16(a)(2)(B)-(I) automatic discovery has passed with no production

re_line: State of Maine v. Mary C. Public, Blake H. Loe2026-0912 — overdue automatic discovery
overdue_items: The video recording of the traffic stop referenced on page 2 of the incident report (Rule 16(a)(2)(F)).
The names, dates of birth, and addresses of the witnesses the State intends to call (Rule 16(a)(2)(H)).
Written or recorded statements of those witnesses and the summaries of their statements contained in the police reports (Rule 16(a)(2)(I)).
served_party: the Office of the District Attorney, Kennebec County
